subject: Vulpix (Kanto form) — small orange-red fox creature with multiple curling tails, sitting in a warm outdoor setting
description: A small orange-red fox creature sits in a low crouch on warm-toned ground. It has large round eyes, a pointed snout, small rounded ears with a curl of fur at each tip, and multiple curling tails fanned behind it. The background shows a warm dusk or late-afternoon sky with soft warm lighting. The coloring throughout is unmistakably warm — orange, amber, and reddish tones. This is visually confirmed as the Kanto (Fire-type) form: the orange-red coat and warm tails are clearly visible, not the white coloring of the Alolan form.
foreground: orange-red fox creature with multiple curling tails
background: warm-toned outdoor setting with soft sky
